♡ ♡ ♡ ♡
💋 Case Study · Maybelline × Myntra · V-Day 2025
Sealed With Love — Campaign Strategy

"Valentine's Day Like Never Before" — Packaging Collab + VTO + CGI Hype 💕

Led the full 360° V-Day activation on Myntra — India's first-ever packaging collab, dedicated V-Day store, first-ever VTO Looks and local CGI hype to drive Gen-Z intrigue and sellout.

🎯 Three Tactics That Won

How we built the campaign

📦
First-ever packaging collab with Myntra: Maybelline QR sticker on 4L fashion parcels, targeting non-beauty consumers. ~4.2M views on hype content · 10K QR scans
🏪
Best-in-class on-platform experience: Dedicated V-Day store, gamified coupon reveal, disproportionate SOV · 3.1MN FOC impressions · 1.8x PDP views vs BAU
🪞
First-ever VTO Looks on Myntra: Multi-product looks curated with bestsellers · 75K clicks · 1.7x conversion for VTO users

V-Day 2025 · Myntra 💕

First-ever packaging collab · VTO Looks · CGI hype · Platform takeover

🍫 ✦ ✦ ✦
🍫 Case Study · Cadbury Silk × Maybelline · Blinkit · V-Day 2025
Quick Commerce Gifting Strategy — Separate Activation

Beauty meets chocolate — reaching the gifter, not just the makeup buyer 💜

Identified a gifting opportunity through Google Trends: chocolate searches peak on Chocolate Day (Feb 7–9). Cadbury held the highest SOV in gifting. Built 5 exclusive Silk × Maybelline bundles in 10 minutes — the only beauty brand on first scroll for Teddy Day, Kiss Day and Chocolate Day.

🔥 Results · Cadbury × Blinkit

Sold out during Valentine's week

📊

Data-led insight

Google Trends: chocolate search index hits 100 on Feb 9. Cadbury Dairy Milk = highest SOV in India's V-Day gifting category.

🤝

5 exclusive Blinkit bundles

Only beauty brand on first scroll for Teddy Day, Kiss Day & Chocolate Day. Co-marketed across beauty and confectionery with co-created advocacy.

🔥

1.6x offtake vs BAU · 60% Feb contribution · Sold out

First-of-its-kind channel + partnership model for Maybelline India on quick commerce.

Cadbury × Maybelline 🍫💄

Blinkit · V-Day 2025 · 1.6x offtake · Sold out · Category crossover

💋 ✦ ✦ ✦
💄 Case Study · Serum Lipstick × Kiara Advani · Feb 2026
India Launch — "Love at 1st Swipe"

Launching India's newest bullet lipstick with Bollywood's biggest spokes moment 🌟

Led the 360° launch of Maybelline's Serum Lipstick — India's first serum-infused bullet — with Kiara Advani as brand spokesperson. 3 pillars: Serum Infused · 100% Indian Suited · Hack Virality.

🎯 Pre-Tease → Reveal → Scale

Building intrigue before the drop

🔍
Pre-tease: Kiara's "not-so-casual" red lip selfie sparked viral debate. Diet Sabya launched an investigation. Bollywood celebs dropped breadcrumbs.
📽
Reveal: Kiara × Maybelline film dropped — 2.2MN organic views · 90MN unique PR reach · 495+ clippings · €90MN PR value
📣
Scale: 2,000+ creators activated · 100MN organic reach · 4 cool-tural creator cohorts

Serum Lipstick · 2026 💄

Kiara Advani · Love at 1st Swipe · 90MN PR reach · Blockbuster launch

📦 ✦ ✦ ✦
🎁 Innovation · E-commerce's First-Ever Beauty Blind Box · Feb 2026
Tapping the Kidulting Trend — Serum Lipstick · Nykaa Exclusive

India's first blind box beauty drop. 1,500 units. Sold out in 6 hours. 🔥

Tapped into the global "Kidult" trend — Labubus, mystery drops, collectible culture — and brought it to Indian beauty for the first time. Limited-edition Serum Lipstick blind box on Nykaa, some packs containing Kiara's signed lipstick.

🇮🇳 India Centricity — Global Cool, Local Roots
